this_title: The Mega-Brands That Built America Season 1
trans_title: 造就美国的超级品牌 第一季
introduction: THE Mega-Brands That Built America is the newest series in History’s “That Built” franchise, telling the origin stories of some of the most successful businesses in history: from mega-stores like Costco and Walmart to sporting goods giants like Spalding and Wilson, titans like Ivory Soap, Schick and Gillette, to shipping giants like Fedex and UPS, and countless more of the biggest brand names in history. Each story is told through the “That Built” franchises’ signature blend of expert interviews and archival, mixed with original premium recreations. Through the eyes of the visionaries and entrepreneurs behind the brands, the series takes viewers on a journey; starting with how it all began, following the innovations, the failures, and all the incredible achievements that forever changed the way Americans live. It’s everything you didn’t know about the colossal brands you know so well.S1 E1 - Battle of the SuperstoresS1 E2 - The World DeliveredS1 E3 - A Whole New BallgameS1 E4 - Dirty Work“The Mega-Brands That Built America” is produced for The HISTORY Channel by Lucky 8 TV. Kim Woodard, Greg Henry, Isaac Holub, George Kralovansky, Shari Ortner, Brian Burstein, and Harry Courniotes serve as executive producers for Lucky 8 TV. Jim Pasquarella and Brandy Crawford-Uriu serve as executive producers for The HISTORY Channel.
chinese_title: 造就美国的超级品牌 第一季
foreign_title: The Mega-Brands That Built America Season 1
